LanguageData.HAR_OT_Backstory_e_A1.title: Haos Member
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Backstory_e_A1.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a member of Haos. Thanks to natural talent, she can handle a wide range of skills fairly well.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Backstory_e_C1.title: Murky Origins
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Backstory_e_C1.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s origin story lacks proof and does not sound especially believable. She herself does not seem to care much.
